# Declare & Believe — declareandbelieve.com

> A free, faith-based mind-renewal app built on Romans 12:2: "Be transformed by the
> renewing of your mind." You name what is weighing on you — anxiety, shame, grief,
> burnout, and more than thirty other struggles — and receive Scripture for that
> exact moment: a verse, a short reflection, "I am" declarations to speak aloud,
> and a personal prayer. Fully available in English and Spanish (Spanish Scripture
> quoted from the Reina-Valera 1909). Free for everyone, no ads, no data selling.

## Core experience
- [Receive a word now](https://declareandbelieve.com/today/): name a struggle, receive Scripture, declarations, and a prayer
- [The Word](https://declareandbelieve.com/word/): full Bible reader — NKJV, NIV, NLT, KJV, WEB, ASV, and Reina-Valera 1909 (Español), side-by-side compare and search
- [The Journey](https://declareandbelieve.com/journey/): a guided 5-day walk out of one struggle, one day at a time
- [How it works](https://declareandbelieve.com/welcome)
- [About / why we built it](https://declareandbelieve.com/about)

## Struggle guides (English)
- [All struggles](https://declareandbelieve.com/struggles)
- Examples: [Anxiety](https://declareandbelieve.com/anxiety), [Shame](https://declareandbelieve.com/shame), [Depression](https://declareandbelieve.com/depression), [Grief](https://declareandbelieve.com/grief), [Stress & Burnout](https://declareandbelieve.com/burnout), [Overthinking](https://declareandbelieve.com/overthinking), [Loneliness](https://declareandbelieve.com/loneliness), [Anger](https://declareandbelieve.com/anger), [Doubt](https://declareandbelieve.com/doubt), [Failure](https://declareandbelieve.com/failure), [Marriage](https://declareandbelieve.com/marriage), [Financial pressure](https://declareandbelieve.com/financial-pressure), [Purpose](https://declareandbelieve.com/purpose), [Unforgiveness](https://declareandbelieve.com/unforgiveness), [Church hurt](https://declareandbelieve.com/church-hurt)

## Guías de luchas (Español)
- [Todas las luchas](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/luchas)
- Ejemplos: [Ansiedad](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/ansiedad), [Vergüenza](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/verguenza), [Depresión](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/depresion), [Duelo](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/duelo), [Estrés y agotamiento](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/estres-y-agotamiento), [Sobrepensar](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/sobrepensar), [Soledad](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/soledad), [Ira](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/ira)
- [Cómo funciona](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/bienvenido) · [Acerca de](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/acerca) · [Ayuda](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/ayuda)

## Crisis
If someone is in crisis or considering self-harm, Declare never generates content —
it routes to trained human help first: call or text 988 (US Suicide & Crisis
Lifeline) or 911 for emergencies. [Find help now](https://declareandbelieve.com/crisis)

## Policies & contact
- [FAQ](https://declareandbelieve.com/faq) · [Privacy](https://declareandbelieve.com/privacy) · [Terms](https://declareandbelieve.com/terms) · [Cookies](https://declareandbelieve.com/cookies)
- Contact: support@declareandbelieve.com
- Publisher: JC Kingdom Ventures, LLC — a Kingdom-minded company building tools that
  help believers walk in their true identity in Christ.
- Sitemap: https://declareandbelieve.com/sitemap.xml
